hero.title: Hat Model Advertisement
hero.description: Build model-based hat ad creatives from one product image plus text direction. This workflow combines prompt generation, image generation, and optional motion-ready steps for fashion campaigns.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload a hat image and enter product direction

steps.title: Upload the hat product image
steps.description: Provide your product reference so the workflow can preserve shape, color, and signature design elements.

steps.title: Add product and style instructions
steps.description: Enter product name and desired pose or styling goals. Text-generation nodes convert your brief into production-ready prompts.

steps.title: Generate model ad visuals
steps.description: Image generation nodes create campaign frames with model styling, composition control, and fashion-forward presentation.

steps.title: Export for ecommerce and social
steps.description: Use the outputs for listing creatives, seasonal campaign banners, and social marketing assets.

items.question: What is the Hat Model Advertisement workflow?
items.answer: It is a fashion ad template that combines product image input and text instructions to generate model-based hat campaign visuals.

items.question: What do I need to prepare before running it?
items.answer: Prepare at least one clear hat product image and a short text brief describing style, model posture, or campaign mood.

items.question: Can I control the ad style with prompts?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow includes text-generation steps so you can refine tone, composition, and styling direction before final image generation.

items.question: Is this only for hats?
items.answer: The template is optimized for hats and headwear, but you can adapt it for other accessory categories by changing references and prompts.

items.question: Can I create multiple versions for A/B testing?
items.answer: Absolutely. Swap text instructions or product references to quickly generate variant sets for campaign testing.

items.question: Can outputs be used commercially?
items.answer: Yes, this workflow is built for ecommerce and brand marketing use. Make sure your input assets and final usage comply with platform and model policies.
